2_primaryJTBD.decision: Which session should I review or continue?

primaryCTA.label: View session details or continue in-progress session

3_decisionVsInfoRatio.assessment: GOOD - Strong decision focus for list page
3_decisionVsInfoRatio.dominantDecision: Yes - Session selection is clear primary action

4_visualHierarchy.assessment: EXCELLENT - Filter-first design with scannable card list

5_kpiQuality.assessment: MODERATE - Mix of actionable status and neutral info

7_flowAndNavigationCost.assessment: EXCELLENT - Inline filtering and search, minimal navigation

8_stateCoverage.assessment: GOOD - Has loading and empty states with CTA
gaps: No visible error handling for API failures
No 'at risk' indicator for incomplete sessions from >7 days ago

9_roleScalability.recommendation: Well-designed for all levels - clear list with filtering

10_strategicVerdict.diagnosis: Professional session list with excellent filtering and pagination
10_strategicVerdict.currentBehavior: Searchable/filterable list with pagination and smart routing (in_progress → evaluate, completed → view)
10_strategicVerdict.desiredBehavior: Searchable/filterable list with pagination and smart routing

topIssues.issue: No error handling visible in component (may be handled in container)
No 'at risk' indicator for incomplete sessions from long ago
topIssues.impact: Old in_progress sessions may be forgotten

topIssues.issue: Evaluation scores shown without context (is 7/10 good or bad?)

10_strategicVerdict.structuralFix: Add error boundary + add 'stale session' indicator for old in_progress + add score context (vs personal average)

11_crossPageConsistency.note: Uses shadcn/ui components (modern pattern). Collapsible filter pattern similar to TournamentCalendarPage. Pagination component reusable. AI Coach guide integration (good pattern).

stateHandling.empty: EmptyState component with CTA to create new session
stateHandling.error: Not visible in this view component (may be in container)

dataSource.note: Receives data via props from container component (SessionsListContainer)

accessibility.keyboardNav: Good - uses button elements with aria-label for pagination

advancedFeatures.pagination: Custom SessionPagination component with ellipsis for many pages
advancedFeatures.smartRouting: Routes in_progress sessions to /evaluate, completed to /view
advancedFeatures.activeFilterIndicator: White dot on filter button when filters active

overallAssessment: EXCELLENT - Professional session list with advanced filtering, pagination, and smart routing
